title: PayPal to cut 2,000 jobs as tech woes continue
text: PayPal Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:PYPL) has become the latest technology firm to slash jobs in a bid to reduce costs, saying on Tuesday it would cut 7% of its global workforce. Some 2,000 jobs will be lost at the online payment giant, chief executive Dan Schulman said in a statement, adding the company had “more work to do,” as it restructures to cut costs.
